prompt: In image 1, update the chat screen with the dark background and pink/grey message bubble style from image 2, keeping all bubble positions and texts intact; add the grey offline status circle from image 3 to the bottom-right edge of the profile picture; and replace all grey double checkmarks with the blue read checkmark from image 4; all edits should be scaled to match the original layout sizes in image 1.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1, a WhatsApp chat screenshot, by applying the following modifications while preserving original message texts, bubble positions, and overall layout scale:

1.  **Chat Style Update:** Change the background of the chat screen in image 1 to a dark color. For the message bubbles, apply the pink style from image 2 to the existing green (sender) bubbles on the right, and the dark grey style from image 2 to the existing grey (recipient) bubbles on the left.
2.  **Profile Picture Status:** Add the solid grey circle from image 3 to the bottom-right edge of the user's profile picture located at the top-right of image 1.
3.  **Read Receipt Update:** Replace the grey double checkmark next to the "12:59 PM" timestamp on the second message bubble from the top right in image 1 with the blue 'Read' checkmark icon from image 4.
objects: Pink message bubbles on the right
Dark grey message bubbles on the left
Solid grey circle on the bottom-right edge of the user's profile picture
Blue 'Read' checkmark icon next to "12:59 PM" timestamp
Grey double checkmark (should not be present)
WhatsApp chat navigation bar with "Chris Designer" title
